changes.name: バルテス・ホールディングス（お知らせ）
mabl（Release notes）
changes.diff_text:
+2026/07/22 - Reach localhost services over mabl Link
+2026/07/22 - Create file variables to reuse a file across upload steps
-2026/07/14 - Answer the mabl agent when it needs your input
-2026/07/10 - Browse and switch between your test planning chats
-See all 136 articles
+See all 138 articles

changes.name: Postman（ブログ）
changes.diff_text:
+APIFlow-Bench: The Enterprise Survival Test for AI Agents
+Zelin Wan
+APIFlow-Bench scores 19 frontier and open-weight models on twenty-subtask API workflows: generated tasks, deterministic grading, and a public leaderboard.
+Read more →
-What’s new in Postman: Secrets management built in
-Quinton Wall
-Postman now detects and vaults API secrets automatically at runtime. Learn how Local Secrets Protection, Shared Vault, and Secrets Resolution keep your credentials safe.
-Read more →
